title: larix olgensis var. komarovii
intro: Larix olgensis var. komarovii, also known as Korean larch, is a variant of the Larix olgensis tree species, native to China, Korea, and parts of Russia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant's properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Larix olgensis var. komarovii are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other medicinal herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
